_README: FINAL, audio-verified substitution map (2026-06-28). These are the ONLY names the ElevenLabs / Michael Caine narration changes from Bryant; most originally-assumed swaps were dropped because the narration keeps Bryant's Latinate forms. Consumed by substitute.py and applied to src/epub/text/book-*.xhtml. Entries are applied IN ORDER, longest / compound / possessive form first, so 'Pallas Athene' resolves before bare 'Pallas' and 'Jove's' before 'Jove'.
_apostrophe: Source uses U+2019 (the curly right single quote). Possessives keep Bryant's exact apostrophe and swap only the name stem: Ulysses' -> Odysseus' (bare, because Bryant wrote it bare), Jove's -> Zeus's, Neptune's -> Poseidon's, Saturn's -> Cronos's, Juno's -> Hera's.
_residuals_not_swapped: Saturnian (8x): adjective form. Saturn -> Cronos IS swapped, but the verified list does not include 'Saturnian' (Greek would be 'Cronian'), so it is left as Bryant has it.
Dian / Dian's (6x): poetic contraction of Diana. Diana is KEPT in the narration, so Dian is kept too (consistent).
